# Iter 7-9 Briefs (pre-generated by research agent, 2026-05-14)

> Position: iter 6 ("Meta With Teeth") is shipping in parallel right now. Iter 7-9 must EXTEND the iter-6 surface (sigils, SHOP_TREE, presets, char roster) rather than reinvent it. The dominant failure mode in this codebase is duplicate systems — every proposed change below names an existing hook to reuse before introducing new state.
>
> Conventions used throughout this doc:
> - All file paths are absolute under `/mnt/c/Users/rneeb/Documents/kitty-kaki-survivors`.
> - `runState` = `state.run` (mutable per-run scratch). `meta` = `getMeta()` (persistent localStorage).
> - "Hook fires from" = call site already exists; just add a read of the new field.
> - "New hook" = needs a new call site, named precisely.
> - Agent boundaries are NON-OVERLAPPING file surfaces. Where two agents must touch the same file (mostly `main.js`, `ui.js`), the line range is split.

---

## Iter 7: Roster Pressure

### Research summary
Vampire Survivors, Halls of Torment, Brotato, Hades, 20MTD, and Death Must Die all converge on the same character-roster trick: characters are **identity tuples** of `(signature mechanic, starting kit, drawback)`, not just stat sliders. VS uses signature-weapon + starting-passive + unlock-condition (Arca = Carrello + +5% projspd at lv2/4/8, unlocked by killing 5000). Halls of Torment leans hard on class-fantasy (Warlock orbits skulls, Norseman swings axes, Archer kites). Brotato makes stats RADICALLY asymmetric (Glutton: +1HP regen per kill; Wildling: huge melee dmg, locked out of ranged). Hades treats the weapon itself as the character — each Aspect rewires the boon pool. The thru-line: a character is FELT in its first 30s, not its 5th level-up. **Today our 4 chars are stat-only `{statMul, hpMax, starter}` tuples** — Boom's +20% dmg / -25% HP plays exactly like default-Kitty wearing one shop upgrade. The signature-mechanic gap is the iter-7 deliverable.

### Proposed roster (4 existing + 2 new = 6 characters)

**Keep all 4 from `src/config.js:149-186`** (id/unlock wiring is already used by Daily and Run History). Add a `signature(runState)` field to each, plus 2 new characters. Order = unlock difficulty.

| id | Name | Icon | Signature mechanic | Unlock condition |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `kitty` | Kitty Kaki | Cat | **Nine Lives**: first lethal hit in a run is converted to 1 HP + 1.5s i-frame (sets `runState.passive_revives += 1` IF `meta.shopTree.survival-2-second-wind` not owned — caps stacking). Tutorial-friendly safety net. | default (already) |
| `boom` | Boom | Bolt | **Charged Coil**: every 5th Chain Lightning arc triggers a free re-cast for full chain count. Reads `runState.signature_chainEcho = true`. | `first_jackpot` achievement (already) |
| `webspinner` | Webspinner | Spider | **Lingering Silk**: every web placed by the player heals 0.5 HP/s to hero while standing inside it. Reads `runState.signature_webHeal = 0.5`. | `minibox_x3` achievement (already) |
| `sniper` | Sniper | Target | **Headhunter**: +200% damage to enemies above 80% HP, -30% to enemies below 20% HP. Reads `runState.signature_executeBonus = true`. Rewards opening burst, punishes greed. | `first_victory` (already) |
| `phoenix` (NEW) | Phoenix Vow | Wing | **Ember Burst**: on dying, emit a 10u shockwave dealing 200 dmg + 0.5s knockback BEFORE the death screen rolls. Single use per run. Reads `runState.signature_emberBurst = true`. | **`meta.lifetime.sigilsEarned >= 30`** (NEW lifetime counter — see 7a) |
| `clockwork` (NEW) | Clockwork | Cog | **Tempo**: every 8s of run-time grants +3% all damage (caps +60% at 2:40). `runState.signature_tempo = { ratePerSec: 0.00375, cap: 0.60 }`. Late-game-payoff identity, the inverse of Phoenix. | **clear Boss Rush mode on Twilight Hollow** (uses existing `meta.unlockedHyper` + new `meta.unlockedClockwork` flag set in `commitRunResults` when victory && bossRush && stage='twilight') |

The 6th archetype is intentionally **late-game scaling** to balance Phoenix's burst identity — they are deliberate mirror unlocks.

### Code surface to add

**Pattern lifted verbatim from `SHOP_TREE` (src/meta.js:468-561):** each tree node defines `effect: (runState) => {...}` which is called from main.js's `applyMetaUpgrades`. We extend the existing CHARACTERS entries with the same shape:

```js
// src/config.js — add to each CHARACTERS entry:
signature: (runState) => { runState.signature_xxx = ... },
signatureName: 'Nine Lives',
signatureDesc: 'First lethal hit per run becomes 1 HP + brief i-frame.',
```

**Single new call site** in `src/main.js` `applyMetaUpgrades` (around line 480, right after the `state.run.starterWeapon = char.starter` line):
```js
if (typeof char.signature === 'function') {
  try { char.signature(state.run); } catch (e) { console.warn('[char.signature]', e); }
}
```

**Hook readers** (existing files, each gets ONE conditional):
- `src/hero.js` `takeDamage()` — Nine Lives + Phoenix Ember Burst. Reads `state.run.passive_revives` (already exists for SHOP_TREE) + new `state.run.signature_emberBurst`.
- `src/weapons/chain.js` — Charged Coil. Reads `state.run.signature_chainEcho` + maintains `state.run.signature_chainEchoCounter` (mod 5).
- `src/weapons/web.js` (or `src/hero.js` `updateHero`) — Webspinner heal. Iterates `state.webs.list`, checks hero inside, adds `state.run.signature_webHeal * dt` to `state.hero.hp`.
- `src/enemies.js` `damageEnemy()` (line 633) — Sniper Headhunter. Reads `state.run.signature_executeBonus` and multiplies dmg by 3.0 / 0.7 based on `enemy.hp / enemy.hpMax`.
- `src/main.js` per-frame tick (the `if (state.mode === 'run')` branch) — Clockwork tempo accumulator.

### 3-agent split

#### 7a — Data layer (config + meta)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/config.js`, `src/meta.js`
**Contract:**
- Add `signature`, `signatureName`, `signatureDesc` to each of the 4 existing CHARACTERS entries (kitty, boom, webspinner, sniper) using the effects listed above.
- Add 2 new CHARACTERS entries: `phoenix` and `clockwork` (icons: choose tasteful unicode/emoji, NOT 🔒 — those are reserved for locked state in ui.js).
- In `src/meta.js` DEFAULT object: add `lifetime.sigilsEarned: 0` to the existing `lifetime` block (line ~59-63). Add `unlockedClockwork: false` to the unlock flags block (~line 35-37).
- In `grantSigils()` (line ~447): also bump `meta.lifetime.sigilsEarned`. **THIS IS THE TIE BREAKER** for sigil-gated unlocks — without it the Phoenix unlock has no counter. Three lines, must not be missed.
- In `commitRunResults()` (line ~680): when `victory && state.modes.bossRush && stageId === 'twilight'` and `!meta.unlockedClockwork`, flip the flag and return `unlockedClockwork: true` so the death screen can toast.
- Add unlock-check helper `isCharacterUnlocked(char, meta)` exported from meta.js, encapsulating: `char.unlock === null` || `meta.achievements[char.unlock]` || (string match for `'sigils:N'` form) || (`unlockedClockwork`/etc flag form). Existing `ui.js:1143` inline check should be replaced with this helper so future unlock kinds plug in cleanly.
- **Do NOT touch:** weapons/, hero.js, enemies.js, main.js (7b owns those), ui.js (7c owns).

**Tuning constants (lock these in):**
- Phoenix unlock: `lifetime.sigilsEarned >= 30` (≈10 mini-bosses or 6 final bosses)
- Phoenix Ember Burst: radius 10u, dmg 200, knockback 0.5s
- Webspinner web heal: 0.5 HP/s (capped at hpMax, never overheal)
- Clockwork tempo: 0.00375/s = +3% / 8s, cap 0.60 at 160s mark
- Sniper Headhunter: hp/hpMax > 0.80 ⇒ ×3.0; hp/hpMax < 0.20 ⇒ ×0.7; middle ⇒ ×1.0
- Boom Charged Coil: every 5th arc spawns a free re-cast (re-uses `chain.fire()`)
- Kitty Nine Lives: 1 HP minimum + 1.5s i-frame; SKIP if `meta.shopTree['survival-2-second-wind']` already owns the player a revive (prevents double-revive stacking)

#### 7b — Hook readers (gameplay wiring)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/main.js` (applyMetaUpgrades + the run-tick branch), `src/hero.js`, `src/enemies.js` (damageEnemy ONLY — not killEnemy), `src/weapons/chain.js`, `src/weapons/web.js`
**Contract:**
- `src/main.js` `applyMetaUpgrades` (~line 480, after the starter-weapon line): call `char.signature(state.run)` if defined.
- `src/main.js` run-loop tick: Clockwork tempo. Each frame in run mode, if `state.run.signature_tempo`, increment `state.run.signature_tempoBonus = Math.min(cap, ratePerSec * state.time.game)`. Hero.js + damageEnemy READS this and stacks it as a damage multiplier.
- `src/hero.js` `takeDamage()`:
  - Nine Lives: if damage would drop hp ≤ 0 AND `state.run.signature_nineLives === true` AND `!state.run.signature_nineLivesUsed`, set hp=1, stamp i-frame timer +1.5s, flip `signature_nineLivesUsed = true`. Skip if shop-tree second-wind already owns the player.
  - Phoenix Ember Burst: when hp falls to 0 AND `state.run.signature_emberBurst`, before any death routing, call `queryRadius(state.hero.pos, 10)` (from enemies.js), `damageEnemy(e, 200, 'phoenix')` each result, knockback via existing `enemy.knockVx/Vz` slots (apply normalized vector × 16). Set `signature_emberBurst = false` so it only fires once.
- `src/enemies.js` `damageEnemy()` (line 633): if `source !== 'phoenix'` and `state.run.signature_executeBonus`, apply Sniper Headhunter multiplier from hp ratio.
- `src/enemies.js` `damageEnemy()`: if `state.run.signature_tempoBonus`, multiply dmg by `(1 + state.run.signature_tempoBonus)`.
- `src/weapons/chain.js`: after fire() resolves, if `state.run.signature_chainEcho`, increment `state.run.signature_chainEchoCounter` (init in main.js). On 5th, immediately fire() again without consuming cooldown.
- `src/weapons/web.js`: in update loop, if `state.run.signature_webHeal > 0`, check hero inside each active web. If yes, `state.hero.hp = Math.min(state.hero.hpMax, state.hero.hp + state.run.signature_webHeal * dt)`.
- **Do NOT touch:** config.js, meta.js, ui.js, weapons/chain.js's evolution logic (keep Storm working).

**Verification:** Boot game, pick each character, confirm signature observable within first 60s of run (Boom: count chain casts, watch every 5th double-fire; Sniper: shoot a fresh wizard, see yellow crit-large damage number even without crit). Use F3 perf HUD to confirm no allocation spikes from new readers.

#### 7c — UI surface (character select polish + unlock pips)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/ui.js` character-picker block (lines 1137-1212 paintChars), `src/weapons/descriptions.js` (characterBlurb), `src/tooltips.js` IF tooltip stat-rows need a new "Signature" row format
**Contract:**
- Replace inline `unlocked = ch.unlock === null || (meta.achievements && meta.achievements[ch.unlock])` with the new `isCharacterUnlocked(ch, meta)` helper from meta.js (7a).
- Add a **signature preview line** to each character card: small italic line under `ch.desc` showing `ch.signatureName` in `C.cyan` with 1-line tooltip hover showing `ch.signatureDesc`. Use existing `bindTooltip` infra (line 1186) — add `signature` to the tooltip stat-rows.
- Add **unlock progress pip** for sigil-gated chars: if `ch.unlock` is the string `'sigils:30'` (or whatever convention 7a picks), render a small progress bar showing `meta.lifetime.sigilsEarned / 30`. Keep dimensions ≤ card width.
- Update `characterBlurb()` in `src/weapons/descriptions.js` to return matching flavor text for `phoenix` and `clockwork`. 2-3 sentence flavor each, matching `LORE` tone in codex.js.
- Death/victory screen: when `unlockedClockwork` returns true from `commitRunResults`, push an amber `tryAchievement`-style banner ("★ CHARACTER UNLOCKED: CLOCKWORK"). Use existing toast/banner infra in ui.js (search `showBanner`).
- Codex hook: `src/codex.js` LORE table already has slots for new entries — add `phoenix` and `clockwork` LORE lines under a new `characters` section if codex supports it, or skip (not blocking).
- **Do NOT touch:** main.js, hero.js, enemies.js, weapons/, config.js, meta.js (read-only via getMeta/setOption).

**Layout note:** charRow flex-wraps at 90vw (line 1139), so 6 cards may flow to 2 rows on narrower viewports. That's fine — confirm `flex-wrap:wrap` still applies; do not force single row.

### Tuning targets

| Knob | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| Phoenix unlock | 30 lifetime sigils | ~10 mini-bosses or 6 final bosses; reached in 3-5 runs by an engaged player |
| Clockwork unlock | Boss Rush + Twilight victory | Hardest combination currently in game (compressed timer + 1.30× HP) |
| Nine Lives revive HP | 1 HP + 1.5s i-frame | Survivable comeback but punishes camping the threshold |
| Phoenix shockwave dmg | 200 | One-shots everything up through tier 5 (orc/demon); kills most elites with ~30% margin |
| Sniper execute mul | ×3.0 above 80% / ×0.7 below 20% | Massive opener bonus; weak finishers force pivoting weapon focus |
| Clockwork cap timing | 60% bonus at 2:40 | First mini-boss at 4:00, so character is "fully online" just before |
| Webspinner heal | 0.5 HP/s | Half of apothecary lv1; identity-defining but not a stand-still cheese |
| Boom Charged Coil freq | every 5th arc | Frequent enough to feel; not so often the visuals overlap |

### Risk flags
- **Two characters reading `state.run.passive_revives`** (Kitty Nine Lives + SHOP_TREE Second Wind + SHOP_TREE Phoenix tree node) — make sure the increment in `char.signature()` doesn't get double-applied. 7a's Kitty signature should check `if (!runState.passive_revives) runState.passive_revives = 1` (NOT `+= 1`) to play nice with the shop-tree path.
- **Sniper Headhunter is a balance grenade** at ×3.0 — playtest with first_victory unlock conditions before shipping. Easy dial-down in 7a constants block.

---

## Iter 8: Enemy Identity

### Research summary
Hordes go from "wall of HP" to "named threats" via three layers: **silhouette** (Risk of Rain 2's lemurians vs. wisps), **telegraph** (Hades wind-ups + sound stings), and **counterplay grammar** (Dead Cells: every enemy has ONE answer — kite, dodge, burst, ranged-interrupt, position). Diablo 3 and PoE add **elite affixes** (vampiric, jailer, frozen, leaping) on top of base enemies, so a level-1 zombie + "frozen orb" affix plays like a totally different fight than the base. **What we have:** `enemyTells.js` already ships elite ground rings, ranged wind-up crescents, threat dots — that's the silhouette layer. `bossTelegraphs.js` ships a 1.2s wind-up + shockwave for all 4 named bosses. **What's missing:** all 3 mini-bosses run the SAME shockwave attack — there is no per-boss attack identity, despite each having a name. Regular enemies have ZERO affix variation; they are pure stat blocks. Procedural anim differentiates silhouette but not behavior. Counterplay is monoculture: "kite or burst" works on everything.

### Proposed enemy archetypes (5 + per-boss patterns)

Five distinct counterplay grammars, applied as `e.affixes` modifiers on top of existing tier configs (NOT new tiers). Reused enemy object slots:

| Affix | Slot | Counterplay grammar | Visual tell |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Volatile** | new `e._volatile` | On death, explodes for 35 dmg in 4u. *Don't melee, don't dash through.* | Cyan glow on elite ring (reuse `makeRuneRingTexture` tint param) |
| **Vampiric** | new `e._vampPct = 0.15` | Heals 15% of damage dealt back into self. *Burst-or-bust; chip damage loses.* | Red threat dot above head (reuse `_threatDots` instance with COL_FINAL color) |
| **Leaping** | new `e._leapCD`, `_leapWindup` | Every 4s, telegraphs a 0.6s windup then leaps 8u toward hero (i-frame friendly). *Position-aware, dash-cancellable.* | Magenta arc indicator at landing site (NEW: reuse `_rangedTells` mesh with new `_leapMarker` slot — same `RingGeometry` + crescent geo) |
| **Shielded** | new `e._shieldHp = 50` | Takes 1 dmg from any hit until shield broken (50 hits or stagger from dash). *Burst-immune; rewards sustained chain/orbital DPS.* | Gold rim flicker on enemy mesh (toggle existing `_injectRim` overload — add `_shieldedRim: true` userData) |
| **Swift** | new `e._swiftMul = 1.6` | Move speed ×1.6, contact damage ×0.6. *Forces aim-leading; punishes camping.* | Faint trailing afterimage (cheap: clone mesh once on spawn, alpha 0.3, lag pos by 0.15s) |
| **Frosted** | new `e._frostAura = 3` | Aura within 3u slows hero move speed 25%. *Don't get in melee range.* | Cyan particles drifting upward (reuse pickup `freeze` octahedron texture, scaled small) |

Six affixes; each enemy rolls 0-1 affix at spawn time, weighted by D(t). Below D=2, zero affixes. Above D=4, 30% chance of one affix. Elites get TWO affixes above D=5.

### Per-boss attack patterns (the real iter-8 unlock)

`bossTelegraphs.js` currently runs ONE attack (shockwave) for all bosses. Replace with `MINI_BOSS_PATTERNS[idx]` indexed by spawn order (matches `MINI_BOSS_NAMES`):

| idx | Boss | Pattern | Mechanic |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | GROTHAR THE GLUTTON | **Engulf** | 1.2s windup, then PULLS hero 6u toward Grothar over 0.4s, deals 14 dmg + 1.0s slow. Counterplay: pre-dash AWAY during windup. |
| 1 | VEXMAW THE SHRIEKER | **Sonic Cone** | 0.9s windup with a 90° forward cone tell (reuse `makeRuneRingTexture` on a wedge geo), then a fast 0.2s pulse — 22 dmg if hero inside cone. Counterplay: side-step. |
| 2 | OBLIDOR, IRON COLOSSUS | **Quake Cross** | 1.6s windup (slower, harder hit), spawns 4 perpendicular shockwave rings at the cardinal directions, each 6u long × 2u wide. 26 dmg. Counterplay: stand in the gaps. |
| - | THE NIGHTMARE | **Phase Cycle** | Cycles through Engulf → Sonic Cone → Quake every 5s. Counterplay: read the windup color (each pattern keeps its tell tint). |

### Code surface to add

- `src/enemies.js` `spawnEnemy()` (~line 305): after the enemy object literal, call new `_rollAffixes(enemy, D)` that mutates `enemy.affixes = [...]` and stamps the per-slot fields (`_vampPct`, `_volatile`, `_shieldHp`, etc.).
- `src/enemies.js` `damageEnemy()` (line 633): respect `_shieldHp` (clamp dmg to 1 until depleted), apply `_vampPct` heal.
- `src/enemies.js` `killEnemy()` (line 437): if `e._volatile`, queue a 0.2s delay explosion call (reuse `spawnKillRing` + iterate `queryRadius(e.mesh.position, 4)` and `damageEnemy(o, 35, 'volatile')`).
- `src/enemies.js` `updateEnemies()` (line 671): aura affixes (`_frostAura`) check hero distance per frame, leap affix (`_leapCD`) drives a windup-then-translate.
- `src/bossTelegraphs.js`: replace `_resolveShockwave` with a switch on `boss._patternIdx`. Add `_makeConeTell`, `_makeCrossTell` helpers (reuse `makeRuneRingTexture` + new wedge / line geometries).
- `src/spawnDirector.js` `spawnMiniBoss()` (~line 84): stamp `_patternIdx = _miniBossIdx` on the buffed config so `bossTelegraphs.js` can dispatch.

### 3-agent split

#### 8a — Affix system (data + spawn-time roll + readers)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/enemies.js` (spawnEnemy + damageEnemy + killEnemy + updateEnemies — full ownership), new file `src/enemyAffixes.js`
**Contract:**
- Create `src/enemyAffixes.js` exporting `AFFIX_POOL` (array of `{id, name, weight, apply(e), onDeath?(e), onAuraTick?(e, dt)}`) and `rollAffixes(enemy, D)`.
- `rollAffixes(enemy, D)`:
  - D < 2: no-op.
  - 2 ≤ D < 4: 10% chance, 1 affix.
  - 4 ≤ D < 5: 30% chance, 1 affix.
  - D ≥ 5 + elite: 50% chance of 1, 20% chance of 2 (distinct).
  - Final bosses get NO affixes (they have their own patterns).
- Each affix's `apply(e)` stamps a slot field. Match these exact names for readers:
  - Volatile: `e._volatile = true`
  - Vampiric: `e._vampPct = 0.15`
  - Leaping: `e._leapCD = 4.0`, `e._leapWindup = 0`
  - Shielded: `e._shieldHp = 50; e._shieldedRim = true`
  - Swift: `e._swiftMul = 1.6` (apply at apply-time: `e.spd *= 1.6; e.dmg *= 0.6`)
  - Frosted: `e._frostAura = 3`
- In `spawnEnemy` after the existing object literal, call `rollAffixes(enemy, computeDifficulty(state.time.game))`. Import `computeDifficulty` from spawnDirector if exported, else inline the formula.
- In `damageEnemy`: shield clamp ABOVE the existing crit/variance code, vampiric heal AFTER the hp deduction.
- In `killEnemy`: volatile explosion via `setTimeout(0)` or a queued `state.fx.pendingVolatile.push({x, z})` (whichever fits — explosion must not recurse infinitely).
- In `updateEnemies`: frost aura check (hero distance < 3u → set `state.run.affix_frostSlow = 0.75` for THIS frame, reset to 1 next frame); leap tick.
- Add `state.run.affix_frostSlow = 1` to `resetState`-style init (it's a per-frame value, but needs initialization).
- Codex hook: when an affix first triggers, fire `notifyAffixSeen(id)` against codex.js's new `affixes` section (8c handles UI).
- **Do NOT touch:** bossTelegraphs.js, enemyTells.js, spawnDirector.js, ui.js, codex.js.

#### 8b — Boss attack patterns (per-boss telegraphs)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/bossTelegraphs.js`, `src/spawnDirector.js` (one line: stamp `_patternIdx`)
**Contract:**
- In `spawnDirector.js` `spawnMiniBoss()` (~line 95), add `_patternIdx: _miniBossIdx` to the `buffed` object so the telegraph module knows which pattern to run.
- In `bossTelegraphs.js`:
  - Export new `MINI_BOSS_PATTERNS` array `[engulfPattern, sonicConePattern, quakeCrossPattern]`.
  - Each pattern is `{ windupColor: 0xrrggbb, windupDuration: <sec>, makeTell(boss): Mesh, resolve(boss): void }`.
  - Replace the existing `if (e._windupStart > 0) { ... _resolveShockwave(...) }` block (lines ~119-150) with a dispatch:
    - On windup start: `pattern.makeTell(boss)` returns a mesh assigned to `boss._tellRing`. Boss.\_patternIdx % 3 picks the pattern (final boss cycles via `Math.floor(t / 5) % 3`).
    - On windup end: `pattern.resolve(boss)`.
  - Engulf resolve: lerp `state.hero.pos` toward boss over 0.4s (use existing `_activeRings` slot for the visual pull — repurpose as a contracting ring). Damage 14 + 1s slow via `state.run.signature_engulfSlowUntil = state.time.game + 1.0` (read by hero.js movement).
  - Sonic Cone resolve: 90° forward cone via `Math.atan2` against hero; if hero in cone (dot product ≥ 0.71 i.e. cos(45°)), `heroTakeDamage(22)`. Visual: 0.3s expanding wedge using new `_makeConeRing(boss, color)` (PlaneGeometry + `makeRuneRingTexture()` clipped via custom UV).
  - Quake Cross resolve: 4 expanding lines at cardinal+45° offsets from boss position. Each line is a thin rectangle (PlaneGeometry 6×2 rotated to cardinals). If hero inside ANY line's bbox at resolve, `heroTakeDamage(26)`. Visual reuses `_makeShockwaveRing` but stretched.
- Reuse `makeRuneRingTexture()` from enemyTells.js — DO NOT invent new ring art.
- Keep existing `resetBossTelegraphs()` working (clean up all pattern types).
- **Do NOT touch:** enemies.js, enemyTells.js (read-only via imports), ui.js, hero.js (only ADD `signature_engulfSlowUntil` read — but that's an 8a concern; actually put the move-speed slow read in hero.js's `updateHero` as a 1-line addition AND list it here).

**Sub-task:** add `if (state.run.signature_engulfSlowUntil > state.time.game) moveMul *= 0.5;` in hero.js's `updateHero` movement code. Two lines. Surfaces as part of 8b because the data-source is the boss pattern.

#### 8c — UI surface (codex affix tab + tooltip preview + named-tell legend)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/codex.js`, `src/enemyTells.js` (the rim/dot tint helpers ONLY — not the init code), `src/tooltips.js` (read-only — reuse existing API)
**Contract:**
- `src/codex.js`: add new `affixes` section to LORE. 6 entries with 2-sentence atmospheric flavor each, matching wolf/zombie tone.
- `notifyAffixSeen(id)` exported function (called from 8a). Stamps `meta.codex.affixes[id].discovered`.
- Codex modal: add new "Affixes" tab next to Enemies/Weapons. Show 6 affix cards, locked-with-hint until discovered (same `???` treatment as enemies).
- `src/enemyTells.js`: extend elite-ring color logic — when an enemy has `e._volatile`, override `col = COL_VOLATILE` (cyan 0x66ddff). When `e._vampPct`, blend with red. When `e._shieldedRim`, add a gold flicker on the ring's instanceColor by modulating with `Math.sin(t*8)`. This is the silhouette layer telling players "this isn't a normal trash mob".
- Add a `Legend` overlay to the Codex modal (1-screen, opens via "Legend" button): visually shows each affix tell (cyan ring = volatile, red dot = vampiric, magenta arc = leap landing, gold shimmer = shielded, blur trail = swift, cyan motes = frost). Critical for player teaching.
- **Do NOT touch:** enemies.js, bossTelegraphs.js, spawnDirector.js.

### Tuning targets

| Knob | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| Affix roll D < 2 | 0% | Tutorial-friendly opening 2 min |
| Affix roll D = 4 | 30% | Around 4-5 min, run is "in motion" |
| Affix roll D ≥ 5 elite | 50% / 20% double | Late-game variance spike |
| Volatile dmg | 35 in 4u | Hurts but won't one-shot most builds |
| Vampiric heal % | 15% | Annoying without being un-killable |
| Leap dist | 8u in 0.6s windup | Dash-cancellable (dash is 0.22-0.30s) |
| Shield HP | 50 hits | ~2s of orbitals at lv3, ~0.5s of evolved storm |
| Swift spd mul | 1.6 spd, 0.6 dmg | Fast but glassy on damage |
| Frost aura | 3u, 0.75 hero spd | Forces kite play in the affix radius |
| Grothar pull | 6u in 0.4s | Just enough to break dash |
| Vexmaw cone | 90° forward, 22 dmg | Side-step solves it |
| Oblidor quake | 4 lines + safe gaps | Read 1.6s windup, position right |

### Risk flags
- **Volatile + dash combo:** if a player dashes into a volatile elite and it dies mid-dash, the i-frame should still apply. Verify `e._volatile` explosion respects hero i-frames (heroTakeDamage already checks this). Easy.
- **Quake Cross with 200+ enemies in scene:** 4 hitboxes × Math distance check per resolve = 800 ops, fine. But the rings are 4 fresh `THREE.Mesh` allocations per resolve. Pool them in `_activeRings` (existing slot) to avoid GC.
- **Frost aura per-frame distance check** runs across ALL enemies — only check the small subset that have `e._frostAura` set. Add early-out.

---

## Iter 9: Retention Hooks

### Research summary
Survivors-likes live on three retention axes: **daily** (VS daily challenge, Slay the Spire daily climb, Balatro daily seed), **weekly/seasonal** (PoE leagues, MTGA seasons, Balatro stakes), and **achievement chains** (VS's chain-unlock graph that gates content via prior progression). The genre default for sharing is a **deterministic seed string** + a **canvas-rendered share card** (Balatro PNG export, Wordle text grid). **What we have:** `meta.dailyChallengeConfig()` uses xfnv1a hash of today's date → returns char+modifier. `commitDailyRun()` tracks personal best. `meta.SECRETS` ships 7 cryptic conditions with purple toasts. `meta.ACHIEVEMENTS` ships 8 flat achievements (no prereq graph). `meta.shopTree` ships the iter-6 sigil tree (prereq DAG). `src/leaderboard.js` ships per-(stage,char,mode) records, top-N queries, seed format (`F-KI-NM-26-05-13`) — and the file's top comment names a Cloudflare Workers POST path that doesn't exist yet. `runHistory.js` ships per-run snapshot + "Re-roll Seed" UI. **What's missing:** no SHARE affordance (the seed exists but you can't copy/export it), no weekly mutator, no PNG/share-card export, no achievement chain DAG, and the leaderboard is local-only with no remote read path. Of these, share-card + weekly mutator + achievement chain are pure-client wins; remote leaderboard is one Cloudflare Worker away.

### Proposed retention hooks

1. **Daily seed share** — copy-to-clipboard button on the Daily card showing today's seed string + result hash. URL param `?seed=F-KI-NM-26-05-13&kills=423&time=905` for shareable links. (Confirmed feasible without dependencies — `navigator.clipboard.writeText` + URL parsing.)
2. **Weekly mutator** — every Monday rolls a fresh "this week only" rule, picked deterministically from ISO week number. Mutator pool: `DOUBLE_SPAWNS`, `HALF_HP_HALF_DMG`, `CHEST_LOCKDOWN` (no chests for first 5 min), `BOSS_PARADE` (4 mini-bosses instead of 3), `NO_PASSIVES` (level-ups only give weapons), `XP_FAMINE` (-30% XP gain).
3. **Achievement chain DAG** — extend `meta.ACHIEVEMENTS` to a tree with `requires: ['parentId']` so unlocking parents lights up children. Tier 1 (current 8) → Tier 2 (require any Tier 1) → Tier 3 (require 3 Tier 2). Each tier unlocks codex chapters / character skins / run modifiers.
4. **Share card (PNG export)** — death/victory screen "Share" button renders a 1200×630 canvas (Open Graph standard) with run stats, character, kills, time, dmg, seed, top weapon. Downloadable as `kk-survivors-<seed>-<timestamp>.png`. Pure DOM, no deps.
5. **Leaderboard surface** — surface what's already in `leaderboard.js` via a new modal "Hall of Records" on start screen. Local-only for v1, Cloudflare-ready API surface for v2 (matches the comment in leaderboard.js:1-13).

### Code surface to add

- `src/meta.js` DEFAULT: add `dailySharedAt: 0`, `weeklyBestKey: ''` (the ISO week of last weekly play), `weeklyBest: { kills, time, character, stage }`.
- `src/meta.js`: new `weeklyMutatorConfig()` (mirrors `dailyChallengeConfig` but keyed by ISO week instead of date).
- `src/meta.js` `ACHIEVEMENTS`: add `tier`, `requires: [parentId]` fields. Add ~12 new achievements for tier 2-3.
- New file `src/shareCard.js` exporting `renderShareCard(runEntry)` returning a `HTMLCanvasElement`. Pure 2D canvas — no THREE.js.
- `src/leaderboard.js`: no schema changes; just add new public `topRunsForCategory(stage, char, mode, n)` if not already present and `formatLeaderboardEntry(entry)`.
- New file `src/weeklyMutator.js` exporting `WEEKLY_MUTATORS` array + `applyWeeklyMutator(runState, mutatorId)` hook called from `main.js` `applyMetaUpgrades`.

### 3-agent split

#### 9a — Data layer (weekly + achievement chain + share-state)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/meta.js`, new `src/weeklyMutator.js`
**Contract:**
- In `meta.js` DEFAULT: add `weeklyBestKey: ''`, `weeklyBest: { kills: 0, time: 0, character: 'kitty', stage: 'forest' }`, `weeklyAttempts: 0`.
- New `isoWeekKey()` function returning `'2026-W19'` style identifier (use the existing date helpers + ISO week math: `Math.ceil((((d - new Date(d.getFullYear(),0,1)) / 86400000) + new Date(d.getFullYear(),0,1).getDay()+1)/7)`).
- New `weeklyMutatorConfig()` — mirrors `dailyChallengeConfig` but uses `_hashStr(isoWeekKey())`. Returns `{ weekKey, mutatorId, mutatorLabel, seed }`.
- New `commitWeeklyRun({kills, time, character, stage})` — bumps weeklyAttempts; if newer-than-stored weekKey, resets the record.
- Extend `ACHIEVEMENTS` array: add `tier: 1` to all 8 existing entries. Add ~12 new entries for tier 2-3:
  - Tier 2: `centurion_x10` (1000 kills lifetime, requires `kills_100`), `evolver` (3 evolutions in one run, requires `first_evolution`), `champion_twilight` (victory on Twilight, requires `first_victory`), `chest_hoarder` (50 chests lifetime, requires `first_chest`), `sigil_collector` (50 lifetime sigils, requires `first_kill`), `triple_x3` (3 separate runs with all 3 mini-bosses, requires `minibox_x3`).
  - Tier 3: `master_collector` (all evolutions discovered, requires `evolver`), `apex_predator` (5000 lifetime kills, requires `centurion_x10`), `void_walker` (victory on Void stage when unlocked, requires `champion_twilight`).
- New `achievementChain(id)` returns `{achievement, parents, children, percentComplete}` — for the codex UI in 9c.
- Wire `isoWeekKey()` into `commitRunResults` to update weeklyBest if the mode was 'weekly'.
- New `src/weeklyMutator.js`:
  - Export `WEEKLY_MUTATORS = [{id, label, apply(runState)}, ...]`. Six total. Each `apply` is the same shape as SHOP_TREE node effects.
  - `DOUBLE_SPAWNS`: `runState.weeklySpawnMul = 2`
  - `HALF_HP_HALF_DMG`: `runState.weeklyEnemyHpMul = 0.5; runState.weeklyEnemyDmgMul = 0.5`
  - `CHEST_LOCKDOWN`: `runState.weeklyChestLockUntilSec = 300`
  - `BOSS_PARADE`: `runState.weeklyExtraMiniBoss = true` (4th mini-boss at 11:00)
  - `NO_PASSIVES`: `runState.weeklyNoPassives = true`
  - `XP_FAMINE`: `runState.weeklyXpMul = 0.7`
- **Do NOT touch:** main.js (9b wires), ui.js (9c wires), shareCard.js (9c owns).

#### 9b — Hook readers (weekly wiring + share API + leaderboard plumbing)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/main.js` (applyMetaUpgrades + run-loop + share button handler), `src/xp.js` (weeklyXpMul reader), `src/spawnDirector.js` (weeklySpawnMul + weeklyExtraMiniBoss + weeklyChestLockUntilSec), `src/enemies.js` `spawnEnemy()` (weeklyEnemyHpMul/DmgMul readers — additive on existing modes), `src/leaderboard.js` (no schema, just add helper for UI consumption), new `src/shareCard.js`
**Contract:**
- `main.js applyMetaUpgrades`: if `meta.optWeekly` is true, call `applyWeeklyMutator(state.run, weeklyMutatorConfig().mutatorId)`. Like Daily, weekly skips shop bonuses for a fair leaderboard. `state.modes.weekly = true`. Incompatible with Daily/BossRush.
- `main.js`: at run-end (death/victory), if `state.modes.weekly`, call `commitWeeklyRun` and `recordRun` with `mode: 'weekly'`.
- `xp.js`: where `growth` mul is applied to gem value, multiply by `(state.run.weeklyXpMul || 1)`.
- `spawnDirector.js`:
  - In horde/spawn-target calc, multiply by `(state.run.weeklySpawnMul || 1)`.
  - In `_nextChest` early-out, check `state.time.game < (state.run.weeklyChestLockUntilSec || 0)` and skip.
  - If `state.run.weeklyExtraMiniBoss && miniSched.length === 3`, push an 11:00 4th boss schedule.
- `enemies.js spawnEnemy`: multiply hpMul by `(state.run.weeklyEnemyHpMul || 1)`, dmg by `(state.run.weeklyEnemyDmgMul || 1)`. Add these to the existing `hyper * dailyHp * stageHp` chain (line ~301).
- `hero.js takeDamage` (or contact damage in enemies.js): if `state.run.weeklyNoPassives`, skip the passive-pick weighting in `weaponChoices` — that's a UI/data concern, see 9c.
- **NEW FILE `src/shareCard.js`:**
  - Export `renderShareCard(runEntry, charSummary) → HTMLCanvasElement`. Inputs match `recordRunResult` entry shape from runHistory.js.
  - 1200×630 canvas (Open Graph standard for Twitter/Discord previews).
  - Layout: dark gradient bg, title bar with game name, big stat block (KILLS, TIME, LEVEL, DMG), character avatar (emoji rendered at 96px), top 3 weapons with mini-bars, seed string in bottom corner.
  - Style tokens identical to ui.js theme (Cinzel display, Inter body, amber/cyan/magenta).
  - Export `downloadShareCard(runEntry)` — calls renderShareCard, `canvas.toBlob(blob => { const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = 'kk-survivors-' + runEntry.seed + '.png'; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href); })`.
  - Confirmed feasible: importmap doesn't gate this. ~80 LOC. Zero new dependencies.
- `leaderboard.js`: add `formatSeedShareString(entry) → '<seed> · <kills>k · <time> · <character>'` for the copy-to-clipboard daily.
- **Do NOT touch:** meta.js (9a), ui.js modal rendering (9c).

#### 9c — UI surface (share buttons + weekly card + achievement DAG + Hall of Records)
**Files (exclusive):** `src/ui.js` (start screen daily/weekly card region ~lines 1258-1300, death screen share button block, achievements modal), new section in `src/codex.js` for achievement-DAG rendering
**Contract:**
- Start screen: add **WEEKLY** button alongside the existing DAILY button (line ~1258). Magenta accent (DAILY is purple, distinguish). Tooltip: today's mutator + personal best + attempts.
- Daily/Weekly cards: add a small `share` icon button (📋) that calls `navigator.clipboard.writeText(formatSeedShareString(entry))` + green toast "Seed copied". Fallback: textarea+select+execCommand for older browsers.
- URL parameter handler: on page boot, if `?seed=` is present, parse and auto-select that mode + show "Replaying X's run" header on start screen. Add to `src/main.js` boot block (this overlaps with 9b — assign URL parse to 9b, just the display tag to 9c).
- Death/victory screen: add big **SHARE** button next to RETRY. Calls `downloadShareCard(latestRunEntry)`. Preview thumbnail (200×105) of the rendered card above the button for visual confirmation.
- Achievements modal (extend existing Codex tab or new tab): render the DAG as a tree.
  - Tier 1 (8 entries) in left column.
  - Tier 2 (6 entries) in middle column, with dotted lines to parents.
  - Tier 3 (3 entries) in right column.
  - Locked nodes show `???` with hint "Requires: <parent name>".
  - Use `achievementChain(id)` from 9a.
- Hall of Records modal: new start-screen button "Records". Calls `topRunsAcrossAll(20)` from leaderboard.js. Renders as table: rank, character, stage, mode, kills, time, seed (clickable to re-roll into next run via existing `setOption` from runHistory.js pattern).
- Codex "Lore" tab: add a `weekly_mutators` section under LORE matching the wolf-style flavor copy for each of the 6 mutators.
- **Do NOT touch:** main.js (9b), meta.js (9a), shareCard.js (9b — only IMPORT and call).

### Tuning targets

| Knob | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| Weekly mutator pool size | 6 | One per day-of-week feel without repeating quickly |
| Weekly best reset | ISO week rollover (Mon 00:00) | Standard leaderboard cadence |
| Share card dimensions | 1200×630 px | Open Graph / Twitter / Discord preview standard |
| Share card LOC budget | ~80 LOC (src/shareCard.js) | Single-file, no deps, easy to maintain |
| Achievement tiers | 3 (existing-8 / +6 / +3) | DAG depth that motivates but doesn't grind |
| Tier-3 unlock value | New character skins / codex chapters | Cosmetic gates, no power creep |
| Hall of Records cap | top 20 across all categories | Fits one screen, matches MAX_TOTAL/10 |
| URL share params | `?seed=X&kills=N&time=N` | Compact, no PII, copy-paste friendly |
| Weekly XP famine | 0.70× XP | Forces tactical pickup; not punitive |
| Weekly double spawns | 2.0× target alive cap | Visually distinct, perf-tested (cap 220) |
| Daily share toast | 1.4s green pulse | Matches existing achievement toast cadence |

### Risk flags
- **canvas.toBlob is async** — `downloadShareCard` must wait on the callback before creating the anchor. Common pitfall: synchronous `canvas.toDataURL` works but at 1200×630 the data-url is 200kb+ in memory, blocks the main thread. Stick with `toBlob`.
- **clipboard API requires HTTPS** — GitHub Pages is HTTPS, but localhost dev (http://localhost:5180) may fail. Add `try { clipboard.write } catch { fallback to selection } ` fallback.
- **ISO week math is timezone-dependent** — use local time consistently with existing `todayKey()` (also local). Test on Sun/Mon boundary at midnight UTC vs local.
- **Achievement DAG complexity:** if a player imports a save from a future build with more achievements, `requires:[]` may reference unknown IDs. Defensive: `if (!ACHIEVEMENTS.find(a => a.id === parentId)) skip the edge`.
- **The biggest hidden complexity is iter 9c's UI surface** — 4 new modals (Weekly card, Hall of Records, Achievement DAG, Share preview thumbnail) is heavier than 7c or 8c. If schedule slips, defer Hall of Records to a later polish iter — it's local-only and players can already see their best via existing death-screen tags.

---

## Cross-iter notes for the parent (read before dispatching)

- **Iter 6 must complete first** — every iter-7 reader assumes `state.run.passive_*` is the canonical scratch pattern, which iter 6 establishes. Don't parallelize 7 with 6.
- **Single-file ownership matters:** `src/main.js` (applyMetaUpgrades + run loop), `src/ui.js` (modals), `src/enemies.js` (damageEnemy + spawnEnemy) are touched by ALL THREE iters. Schedule iter 7 → 8 → 9 sequentially to avoid 3-way merge hell. Each iter is internally parallelizable across a/b/c agents.
- **Sigil counter** (`meta.lifetime.sigilsEarned`) added in iter-7a is referenced by iter-9's achievement chain (`sigil_collector: requires first_kill, lifetime.sigilsEarned >= 50`). Iter 7 ships this first.
- **Hidden iter-8 complexity:** the affix system needs both spawn-time roll AND per-frame readers across damageEnemy/killEnemy/updateEnemies. That's the most code-surface change of all three iters. Budget 1.5× the dev-time of 7 or 9.
- **Hidden iter-9 complexity:** URL parameter parsing + share-card render-preview are easy in isolation but couple boot-flow (main.js boot) to UI surface (ui.js start screen). Land URL parse in 9b first, then 9c reads the parsed result.
- **Mandatory smoke tests after each iter:**
  - `node --check src/<changed-file>.js` per touched file
  - Boot the game, select each character (iter 7), confirm signature observable
  - Spawn (debug command) volatile / vampiric / leaping affixes (iter 8), confirm tells render
  - Toggle weekly + complete a run (iter 9), confirm `meta.weeklyBest` updates

End of brief.
